message:
feat(trace): add hierarchical delta debugging for scenario minimization (bd-77g6j.2)

Adds two complementary minimization modules:

- `delta_debug`: event-level ddmin for scheduling-order-dependent failures
  (races, divergences) operating on ReplayEvent sequences.

- `minimizer`: scenario-level hierarchical delta debugging for
  scenario-construction-dependent failures (obligation leaks, region
  structure). Exploits the structured concurrency tree to prune entire
  region subtrees before fine-grained ddmin, yielding sub-linear replay
  counts. Includes narrative generation for root cause analysis.

The demo (`examples/demo_delta_debug.rs`) sweeps seeds to find an
obligation leak, extracts ScenarioElements, and minimizes to the
smallest reproducing subset (typically 3-4 elements from 30+, ~90%
reduction in 26 replays).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 # This Makefile wraps common cargo commands and demo workflows.
 # All heavy lifting is done by Cargo; these are shortcuts.
 
-.PHONY: test check clippy fmt demo-record clean
+.PHONY: test check clippy fmt demo-record demo-delta-debug clean
 
 # Default: run full test suite.
 test:
@@ -33,5 +33,17 @@ fmt:
 demo-record:
 	cargo run --example demo_record_nondeterministic --features test-internals
 
+# Hierarchical delta debugging demo.
+#
+# Finds a failing seed, extracts scenario elements, and minimizes
+# to the smallest subset that reproduces the obligation leak.
+#
+# Environment variables:
+#   DEMO_SEED_START  - First seed to try (default: 0)
+#   DEMO_SEED_COUNT  - Number of seeds to sweep (default: 50_000)
+#   DEMO_NARRATIVE   - Output path for narrative .md (default: narrative.md)
+demo-delta-debug:
+	cargo run --example demo_delta_debug --features test-internals
+
 clean:
 	cargo clean
